questions.question_text: You are to turn right at the traffic light-controlled intersection. There are no road users directly behind you. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I stay in my own traffic lane all the way up to the crosswalk.
answers.2: I pull into the bus lane and remain in it all the way up to the crosswalk.
answers.3: I cross the bus lane and position myself close to the kerb in front of the bicycle path.

questions.question_text: You are driving at the maximum permitted speed. What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful that the motorway is coming to an end.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful that the expressway is coming to an end.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful that driving a passenger car here is prohibited.
answers.4: I continue at a maximum of 80 km/h after passing the traffic sign.

questions.question_text: You are to turn right here. There are no bicyclists on the bicycle path behind you. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I turn right immediately.
answers.2: I give a flashing light signal with my high-beam headlights.
answers.3: I hold back for the oncoming bicyclist before turning.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful that I am about to cross a double-lane bicycle path.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 50 km/h, the same as the vehicle in front. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 50 km/h.
answers.2: I increase my safety distance to the vehicle in front.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of the condition of the roadway.

questions.question_text: According to the legal provisions, what must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the danger of animals on the roadway.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful that overtaking is prohibited here.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of a rider on the roadway ahead.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road ahead.

questions.question_text: You are to turn left here at the intersection. How will you continue?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the oncoming traffic.
answers.2: I proceed forward to the centre of the intersection.
answers.3: I turn left immediately.
answers.4: I hold back for any oncoming traffic.

questions.question_text: Which lights are you required to drive with here according to the legal provisions?

answers.1: I drive without any lights.
answers.2: I drive with position lights and indicators.
answers.3: I drive with low-beam headlights or high beam.
answers.4: I drive with automatic daytime driving lights.

questions.question_text: You are stationary and are about to set off from the kerb. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I set off immediately.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of the oncoming traffic.
answers.3: I turn my head and check that the roadway is clear behind me.
answers.4: I hold back for a while before setting off.

questions.question_text: You are to continue straight ahead. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I drive around the truck once the oncoming traffic has passed.
answers.2: I hold back until the truck has unloaded and driven off.
answers.3: I find another route that is not obstructed.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 50 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 50 km/h.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of reduced traction ahead.
answers.3: I move my foot over to the brake pedal.

questions.question_text: You have caught up with two caravans that are driving slowly ahead of you. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I overtake both caravans immediately.
answers.2: I overtake the nearest caravan and pull in in front of it.
answers.3: I reduce my speed.
answers.4: I pull over to the right side of the traffic lane.

questions.question_text: You have caught up with the vehicle in front, which is driving slowly. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I overtake the vehicle in front.
answers.2: I move my foot over to the brake pedal.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road ahead.

questions.question_text: You are stationary and are about to set off from the kerb. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I set off immediately.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of the black passenger car that has just passed.
answers.3: I turn my head to check what is happening behind me.
answers.4: I remain stationary for a while longer.

questions.question_text: You are driving at 50 km/h in a built-up area and are about to overtake the grey passenger car driving slowly ahead of you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I increase my speed and overtake the passenger car.
answers.2: I continue at an unchanged speed of 50 km/h and overtake the passenger car.
answers.3: I reduce my speed and abandon the overtaking manoeuvre.
answers.4: I pull in behind the grey passenger car I was about to overtake.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 70 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed between 60 and 70 km/h.
answers.2: I move out to the solid side line on the right-hand side of the roadway.
answers.3: I cross over the solid side line on the right-hand side of the roadway.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 40 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.2: I increase my speed.
answers.3: I stop before the crosswalk.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 40 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.2: I give a flashing light signal with my high-beam headlights.
answers.3: I pull over as far as possible to the right of the roadway.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 40 km/h and are required to continue straight ahead. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.2: I increase my speed.
answers.3: I brake firmly.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 50 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 50 km/h.
answers.2: I reduce my speed.
answers.3: I pull further over to the right of the roadway.

questions.question_text: You are driving on a one-way road and are about to catch up with the truck driving slowly ahead of you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I overtake the truck on its right side.
answers.2: I remain behind the truck.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road ahead.
answers.4: I prepare to change to the far left lane.

questions.question_text: You wish to overtake the slow-moving tractor, but there has been oncoming traffic the entire way. There are no road users behind you. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the oncoming traffic.
answers.2: I overtake the tractor since there are no road users behind me.
answers.3: I remain behind the tractor.

questions.question_text: What does the hand signal given by the police officer mean for you?

answers.1: I am permitted to drive straight through the intersection.
answers.2: I have a duty to stop.
answers.3: I am permitted to turn left at the intersection.
answers.4: I am permitted to turn right at the intersection.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of the surroundings of the road.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of a slippery roadway ahead.

questions.question_text: You have stepped out of the red passenger car. According to the legal provisions, which of the following applies here?

answers.1: I am permitted to park the passenger car here.
answers.2: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for 2 to 3 minutes.

questions.question_text: You have stepped out of the red passenger car. According to the legal provisions, which of the following applies here?

answers.1: I am permitted to park the passenger car here.
answers.2: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for 2 to 3 minutes.
answers.3: I am not permitted to either stop or park here.
